ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., precipitation, wind) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for triggering alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the user accessed data for */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity" (
  "integrity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrity record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the record */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the record data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the record */,
  "last_modified_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integrity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location affected by the alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather event causing the alert */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the alert */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Alert message for the public */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved, cancelled) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., real-time, forecast) */,
  "alert_method" TEXT /* Method of alert delivery (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "predicted_max_temp" INTEGER /* Predicted maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "predicted_min_temp" INTEGER /* Predicted minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "predicted_precipitation" REAL /* Predicted precipitation in millimeters */,
  "forecast_message" TEXT /* General forecast message */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)
